technologies.name: Chiplets
technologies.desc: High-density organic interposers and UCIe interconnect protocols connecting multi-die modular processors.

technologies.name: HBM4
technologies.desc: Next-gen High-Bandwidth Memory stacking with 2048-bit wide physical silicon interfaces and 3D vertical TSVs.

technologies.name: GAAFET
technologies.desc: Gate-All-Around nanosheets replacing legacy FinFET transistors under sub-2nm fabrication nodes.

technologies.name: OpenLane
technologies.desc: Open-source EDA synthesis flow targeting automated standard cell layout and timing verification.

technologies.name: Sky130
technologies.desc: SkyWater 130nm open-source PDK enabling accessible digital, analog, and RF silicon prototyping.

technologies.name: RISC-V
technologies.desc: Open instruction set architecture powering custom processor cores, vector acceleration, and extension pipelines.

technologies.name: Photonics
technologies.desc: Silicon micro-combs utilizing light instead of copper for ultra-fast bus lanes and inter-rack communication.

weeklyDigest.focus: Silicon Co-Design, Backside Power Delivery & GAAFET Topologies
weeklyDigest.editorial: As modern microelectronics approach physical scaling walls, the industry turns to revolutionary Backside Power Delivery Networks (BSPDN) and gate-all-around nano-sheet topologies. This week's compiled intelligence maps ASML's High-NA EUV delivery alongside groundbreaking speculative out-of-order RISC-V vector architectures.
